rationale.old_headroom_0p02: retired for this replication because it was a heuristic 2x multiplier, not a power-derived scientific threshold

hierarchical_estimands.mechanism: persistent_0p90 >= persistent_0p75 > iid, iid abs <= 0.005, shuffled <= 0.005, wrong <= 0
hierarchical_estimands.guardrails: resources exact, no lost/unresolved increase, worst-product delta >= -0.02

hierarchical_estimands.comparison: privileged selector over frozen candidate calendars minus best retained structured H3 MPC
hierarchical_estimands.primary_population: persistent_0p75 and persistent_0p90; iid is reported only as null
hierarchical_estimands.boundary: a pass authorizes D4 observable conversion only; it never authorizes or proves a learner premium

favorable_fraction: reported as heterogeneity; the 70% gate is reserved for final hybrid confirmation, not causal mean accumulated-learning value
